warnings: REP remains the canonical replay authority. MET only emits cross-run consistency observations against MET-owned outputs.
Non-material differences (timestamps, generated_at) are ignored; only material output fields are compared.
failure_prevented: MET outputs silently diverging across runs for the same input fingerprint without an MET observation surfacing the divergence to REP.
signal_improved: Per-fingerprint comparison of MET outputs is recorded with material_fields_compared, divergence_found, and divergence_reason — feeding REP-owned replay analysis.

consistency_entries.failure_prevented: Silent MET output drift across runs for identical inputs.
consistency_entries.signal_improved: Cross-run consistency observation pairs MET outputs and surfaces divergences to REP.
consistency_entries.next_recommended_input: No action required while divergence_found is false.

consistency_entries.failure_prevented: Cross-run divergence going undetected in single-run states.
consistency_entries.signal_improved: Single-run state is explicitly flagged as unknown until a paired run exists.
consistency_entries.next_recommended_input: Capture a second run to enable comparison.
